title: Yoshiyukis Artwork
wikitext:
[]: Yoshiyuki's Artwork             Quote Post by Victorthebattousai » Mon Mar 24, 2008 12:41 am Ok, what are all of the various Sadamoto works of Evangelion? I know of Der Mond, and several others. What are all of them? I simply love his work, especially his Rei illustrations, and I wanna make sure I've seen all of them lol. Also, does he use watercolor for his drawings? It definitely looks like it, but I'm not positive.

[]: Re: Yoshiyuki's Artwork             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 24, 2008 4:23 am Victorthebattousai wrote: Ok, what are all of the various Sadamoto works of Evangelion ? I know of Der Mond, and several others. What are all of them?

[]:             Quote Post by Victorthebattousai » Mon Mar 24, 2008 9:11 am Hmm, how should I put it..... Well, are there any sites that have a lot of his work? Drawings, whatever? I just like searching for new stuff. I've found 90% of his Evangelion drawings that float around the net, but from time to time I find a couple more. Anywhere that might host ALL, or most of his works?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 24, 2008 9:29 am I doubt it. Everyone who thinks they've downloaded everything from everyone else is always missing something. And then the site showing off their "hard-earned" collection goes down.

[]:             Quote Post by Victorthebattousai » Mon Mar 24, 2008 9:58 am Dang. Oh well, guess I'll just have to keep searching. Thanks anyway.

[]: Re: Y
